calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Katya George.

Mr. Leiberman stated that he was filing the petition for conservatorship and that the matter could be taken off calendar. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Continued To Apr-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katya George in Propria Persona.

Ms. George appeared for clarification as to what exactly was needed to establish fact of death. The Court Examiner will speak to her outside of the courtroom to explain what the next step should be. The matter was continued to April 23, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Obi.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katya George (Daughter) in Pro Per.

Ms. George reported that Ms. Blair had no brothers or sisters, that she herself had no siblings, that it had been 7 years since the missing persons report had been done, that she had done as much investigating as possible, but without a court order, she had no authority to gain information from agencies such as Social Security, Passport and the Credit Union. In addition, she reported that Social Security will not stop making payments without a death certificate, and that the money was being deposited into the credit union account. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Julia Capozzoli.
